project_type: AWS CDK Java infrastructure project (event-driven sleep audio processing pipeline)
build_command: mvn test (not available in this sandbox due to network constraints)
test_command: mvn test (not available in this sandbox due to network constraints)
verification_instructions: Manual code review only - Maven Central is not accessible in this sandbox
setup_instructions: Java 17, Maven 3.9+, Node.js 20+, AWS CDK CLI
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode but Maven Central is unreachable. Build/test cannot run. Report must be generated from code review alone.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits, TDD-first, architecture sync, verification gates
key_patterns: CDK assertion tests using Template.fromStack, ObjectMapper for Step Functions JSON parsing, TestUtils shared helper, single stack architecture
directory_structure: Standard Maven layout: src/main/java (CDK stacks), src/main/resources/lambda (Python Lambda), src/test/java (JUnit tests). Documentation at root. CI in .github/workflows.
